sub_modules.gd_poly_derivative: Combinational fixed-point derivative calculator for f'(x) = 2*a*x + b with Q-format rescaling.
sub_modules.gd_poly_step: Combinational fixed-point learning-rate multiplier that computes alpha*f'(x) with Q-format rescaling.
sub_modules.gd_poly_update: Combinational update unit that computes x_next = x_current - step using widened signed arithmetic.
